title: Beautiful Hitboxes
description: This visual mod lets you change hitbox colors.
body:
Beautiful Hitboxes
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Beautiful Hitboxes — a Minecraft mod for 1.21.8 and above that focuses on beautiful, highly customizable visuals and personalized hitbox rendering, allowing players to tailor the visual experience to their preferences.

⚡ Features:
- Customizable player hitbox highlights with outline and fill.
- Rainbow RGB hitbox highlights — the hitbox outline smoothly cycles through all colors of the rainbow.
- Change hitbox color when looking at a player.
- Toggle highlight mode with a hotkey (default: H).
- Additional keybinds available for Auto Sprint and Aspect Ratio toggle (unassigned by default).
- Choose highlight color for better visibility.
- Custom Aspect Ratio support (e.g. 4:3, 6:8, etc.) — works together with Sodium.
- Auto Sprint option for easier movement.
- Sign Search — search for signs by text using ``` /sch <text> ``` and highlight all matching signs in the world.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fef45d027d88130c50d081abba7b8c03fd8bba4b_0.webp)

🚀 Looking ahead – Planned Features:
- Visual hit effect on impact.
- Highlight transparent blocks.
- Highlight the block currently being looked at.
 
📦 Dependencies:
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu
- Cloth Config

🔗 Mod Compatibility:
- Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft. No known conflicts with other mods.
- Previously there was a conflict with Sodium — this has been fixed.
